title: Reproduction capsule: ENSO-conditioned evolution of global mean surface temperature
description: Code and frozen input data to reproduce every figure and table of the manuscript "ENSO-conditioned evolution of global mean surface temperature." A single `make all` regenerates all 12 figures and 6 tables from the archived data alone; `make verify` checks them against the committed reference outputs.

creators.name: Tippett, Michael K.
creators.affiliation: Department of Applied Physics and Applied Mathematics, Columbia University, New York, NY, USA

creators.name: Becker, Emily J.
